## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated behavior-focused tests
- [ ] Confirmed the new test failed before implementation when applicable

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when user-visible or integration behavior changed
- [ ] Updated relevant public documentation

## Privacy and security
